name: Pot of Awakening
entries: If you plant an ordinary shrub in this 10-pound clay pot and let it grow for 30 days, the shrub magically transforms into an {@creature Awakened Shrub|XMM} at the end of that time. When the shrub awakens, its roots break the pot, destroying it.
The awakened shrub is {@variantrule Friendly [Attitude]|XPHB|Friendly} toward you and obeys your commands. Absent commands from you, it does nothing.
